metadata.description: A curated marketplace for Claude Code plugins - documented snapshot of one consultant's Claude Code configuration

plugins.name: example-plugin
plugins.description: Example plugin showing all component types: commands, agents, skills, hooks, MCP config

plugins.name: focus-tools
plugins.description: Executive function support for getting unstuck - cut through overwhelm and identify ONE next action

plugins.name: obsidian-productivity
plugins.description: Complete Obsidian productivity stack: task tracking, email triage, daily standups, and timesheet generation

plugins.name: transaction-analysis
plugins.description: Toll transaction data analysis with automatic client detection (VDOT, DelDOT, MDTA, DRPA), specialized agents, and multi-format reporting

plugins.name: obsidian-vault-management
plugins.description: Vault maintenance skills for large Obsidian vaults. Parallel agent architecture. Windows/PowerShell required

plugins.name: ms-office-suite
plugins.description: Office document skills for Claude Code — PPTX, DOCX, XLSX, and PDF workflows

plugins.name: toll-consulting
plugins.description: Toll industry agents and skills: operations consulting, procurement, and document review

plugins.name: professional-agents
plugins.description: Professional role-based agents for software development and project management

plugins.name: automation
plugins.description: Vault scanning and project management commands for Obsidian

plugins.name: personal-finance
plugins.description: Personal finance education plugin: budgeting, investing, and financial planning grounded in Bogleheads philosophy

plugins.name: career-coach
plugins.description: Career development coaching: GROW model, RIASEC assessment, resume/ATS optimization, STAR interview practice, and salary negotiation

plugins.name: android-dev
plugins.description: Android app development: Jetpack Compose, Kotlin, MVVM architecture, project scaffolding, troubleshooting, and Play Store publishing

plugins.name: boop-scripting
plugins.description: Woop/Boop script API reference, patterns, and template for Windows text transforms

plugins.name: anti-slop
plugins.description: Pre-PR branch quality audit — catches description-diff misalignment, commit hygiene issues, and template compliance
